title: NodeBB Segment 03
summary: Mid-development segment of the NodeBB forum platform covering a major API and architecture evolution. Key themes include: introduction of OpenAPI/Swagger documentation for the read API, ACP privilege system, database driver modernization (async/await migration), controller restructuring, messaging system improvements, category and group management enhancements, and continued internationalization updates across all locales.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: Mid-development segment of the NodeBB forum platform covering a major API and architecture evolution. Key themes include: introduction of OpenAPI/Swagger documentation for the read API, ACP privilege system, database driver modernization (async/await migration), controller restructuring, messaging system improvements, category and group management enhancements, and continued internationalization updates across all locales.

nodes.label: OpenAPI Specification
nodes.description: Swagger/OpenAPI YAML schemas documenting the NodeBB read API. PRs introduce the full read.yaml spec and component schemas for User, Topic, Post, Group, Category, and Pagination objects.

nodes.label: Internationalization / Locales
nodes.description: Translation JSON files across all supported locales. PRs update keys for admin panels, flags, privileges, ACP menus, and introduce new translation namespaces for the evolving feature set.

nodes.label: HTTP Controllers
nodes.description: Express route handlers for topics, categories, users, groups, authentication, admin pages, and the write API. PRs restructure controller files for the new API layer and add analytics endpoints.

nodes.label: Socket.IO Handlers
nodes.description: Real-time event handlers for posts, topics, users, admin, and messaging. PRs migrate socket handlers to use modernized data layer and add new admin socket endpoints.

nodes.label: Database Abstraction
nodes.description: MongoDB and Redis database drivers with async/await migration. PRs modernize connection handling, add new query methods, and improve sorted set operations.

nodes.label: User Module
nodes.description: User data management including authentication, profile, bans, notifications, and email handling. PRs add GDPR consent tracking, improve ban workflows, and refactor user data access patterns.

nodes.label: Topics Module
nodes.description: Topic creation, merging, tagging, following, and scheduled posting. PRs add topic merge functionality, improve tag management, and fix unread tracking edge cases.

nodes.label: Core Server Modules
nodes.description: Top-level server modules including app.js, webserver, notifications, analytics, search, rewards, and utility files. PRs introduce analytics routes, improve startup sequences, and refactor core patterns.

nodes.label: Client-Side JavaScript
nodes.description: Browser-side modules for admin dashboard, topic tools, account pages, composer, and chat. PRs improve ACP UI interactions and add client-side privilege management.

nodes.label: Posts Module
nodes.description: Post creation, editing, deletion, voting, and bookmarking. PRs improve diff generation, add queue management, and fix edge cases in post operations.

nodes.label: Server-Side Templates
nodes.description: Tpl template files for admin panels, topic pages, user profiles, and error screens. PRs add new admin views for privileges and events, and update existing layouts.

nodes.label: Groups Module
nodes.description: Group creation, membership, ownership, and permissions. PRs add group cover photo support, improve search, and refactor membership logic.

nodes.label: Categories Module
nodes.description: Category management including creation, ordering, privileges, and topic listing. PRs improve category data access and active user tracking.

nodes.label: Build System / Meta
nodes.description: Asset compilation, configuration management, and build orchestration. PRs improve template compilation, settings handling, and add new meta endpoints for the admin API.

nodes.label: Privileges System
nodes.description: Permission checking for categories, topics, posts, users, and the new ACP privilege gates. PRs introduce granular admin privileges and improve privilege inheritance.

nodes.label: Messaging Module
nodes.description: Private messaging including room management, message creation/editing, notifications, and unread tracking. PRs improve room data handling and add message pinning support.

nodes.label: Plugin System
nodes.description: Plugin loading, hook registration, and lifecycle management. PRs improve hook execution patterns and plugin data access.

nodes.label: Express Middleware
nodes.description: Request processing middleware for authentication, headers, rendering, and maintenance mode. PRs improve security headers and session handling.

nodes.label: Flags Module
nodes.description: Content flagging and moderation workflow. PRs improve flag state management and add bulk operations.

nodes.label: Route Definitions
nodes.description: Express route registration for API, admin, authentication, and static assets. PRs add new route namespaces for the write API and analytics.

nodes.label: Installation System
nodes.description: Setup wizard, default configuration, and database initialization. PRs update defaults and improve the installation flow.

nodes.label: Schema Upgrades
nodes.description: Versioned database migration scripts for new features. PRs add migrations for privileges, messaging changes, and data normalization.

edges.label: user data stored via database abstraction
server core loads and manages plugins
